title: Twilit open-questions memory system claim
body: Twilit Orbiting Galaxy / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d opened claim 6a7cfd29 for the owner-directed open-questions memory system: contracted operational-memory surface, session-handoff/consolidate-docs wiring, and practice-substrate validator. Scope avoids Eclipsed Cycle 9 collaboration-state files and the active commit queue is empty.
